query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] Good data collected. Phase 1b first — the cycle review shows **0 entries stored this cycle**, so stewardship is clean. Now building the briefing and spawning the architect.
[tool: Bash(git log --oneline main~5..main) → 2ce4f3b fix(observe): remove RecurringFrictionRule from extraction pipeline (#437) (#438)
02bb3a7 chore: add gate report for bugfix-407
38af408 chore: fix MCP integer/tag format ambiguity in skills + CLAUDE.md
38a19ad chore: add security reviewer report (bugfix-434) (#434)
5c1f57f fix(config): lower]
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: ADR-004 crt-025: Phase Narrative as Optional Field on RetrospectiveReport
Security reviewer must verify artifact paths exist before cold-read orientation
Implementation checklist items from approved design must be enumerated in the rust-dev spawn prompt — not left implicit in the investigator report
Batch bugfix sessions must establish a clean worktree from main before spawning work agents
